wiki.summary: “the feeling” is Steve Lacy’s first release of 2026, following 2025 song Nice Shoes, which released on August 15, 2025. On May 27th, 2026, Steve took to Instagram and showcased a video of him playing chords on his piano, with the caption of the video being: ‘the feeling’ chord progression 🥹 the feeling comes first 💌 The day after, on May 28th, 2026, he would post another Instagram video singing and dancing to the new song. wiki.content: “the feeling” is Steve Lacy’s first release of 2026, following 2025 song Nice Shoes, which released on August 15, 2025. On May 27th, 2026, Steve took to Instagram and showcased a video of him playing chords on his piano, with the caption of the video being: ‘the feeling’ chord progression 🥹 the feeling comes first 💌 The day after, on May 28th, 2026, he would post another Instagram video singing and dancing to the new song. In the caption of the video, he wrote: singing and dancing to ‘the feeling’ in the rain with @yslil a moment to remember. first single dropping next week with a video ahhhh june 5 😭 the feeling is coming first ok yayyy “the feeling” is one of the songs featured on Steve’s upcoming third studio album, Oh yeah?.
